entries.note: Per WAC 246-915-990 (renewal $200/yr, annual birthday renewal) via indexed mirrors; a stale secondary source showed $100/$75, indicating a fee change occurred — re-check against live WAC/DOH fees page

entries.expected: Effective 2026-01-01 the WA jurisprudence exam is no longer a pre-licensure requirement; licensees licensed on/after that date complete it once during their first full CE cycle. 16 questions, minimum passing score 70%; no fee (counts as 1 free CE hour)
entries.note: Material rule change — pre-2026 guides stating a pre-licensure JP exam are now wrong

entries.expected: PT: 32 hours of continuing education every 2 years plus 200 hours of active practice application every 2 years; 2 hours health equity CE per cycle; one-time 3-hour suicide prevention training; spinal manipulation endorsement adds 10 hours per cycle
entries.note: License renews annually; CE reported on a 2-year cycle; confirmed against WAC 246-915-085
WA remote-state fee $45 + $2 processing, on top of the $45 Commission fee (total $92); DOH rulemaking in progress may raise compact fees

omitted: wa-fingerprints: no separately stated PT fingerprint fee; fingerprint checks only when triggered by background-question review
wa-license-issuance: DOH publishes only 'a few days to a few weeks' guidance plus a live status page — no fixed figure to pin
